title: Consistent Iron
description: Makes most iron blocks consistent with iron bars.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Consistent Iron** gives iron more depth and a metallic apperance by changing the color pallet to most iron blocks, and items to be consistent with iron bars.

![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>View list</summary>

- Iron Block
- Iron Chain
- Iron Door
- Iron Trapdoor
- Iron Ingot
- Iron Nugget
  
</details>
